title: Cyathostemon heterantherus
taxonomy: Cyathostemon heterantherus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Western Australia. The plant belongs to the genus Cyathostemon, which is a group of shrubs and small trees that are endemic to Western Australia. Cyathostemon heterantherus is often found in sandy and rocky areas, and it is known for its small yellow flowers and small, rounded fruit. The plant's classification is further divided into its family, genus, and species levels, providing a clear understanding of its place within the botanical hierarchy.
